note: Validly-measured: license-plate localization mAP@0.5 = 0.86 (50-image plate holdout) and helmet F1 = 1.0 (small set, n=4). Vehicle/road-user mAP, cross-violation F1, and OCR accuracy are intentionally null: the current holdout lacks full per-image detection GT and balanced violation labels, so reporting them would be misleading. Rule logic for all 7 violation types is verified in tests/test_violation_rules.py. Regenerate live numbers with: python scripts/run_full_eval.py --config config/roboflow.yaml (needs ML deps + ROBOFLOW_API_KEY).
